title: Students

vocabulary.meaning: the latest time something must be finished
a book of empty pages for writing notes
to spend time learning about something
wanting strongly to work or learn well

questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'student'?
Were / Are you a good student?
What was your happiest memory as a student?
Would you prefer to be the student or the teacher?
Do you think students need to work harder?
Should a student's university education be free or should the student have to get a loan?
Do you think being a student is the best time of your life?
Are teachers too afraid of students these days?
How can students help society while they are on their long holidays?
What would you do with a student who didn't want to study?
Did / Do you like being a student?
What is a good student?
What should schools do about students who bully others?
How do students change when they move on to university?
What are the best and worst things about being a student?
Do you think students studying for master's degrees should get paid?
Should all students wear a uniform?
Should school students stand up on public transport to give their seats to working people?
What do you think of the idea of having a student day - a national holiday to celebrate students?
Which is better, being a student or being a worker?
